stops.title: Main Entrance
stops.description: Step through the gates of WCBT in Jhapa, where your journey into technology and innovation begins.

stops.title: Academic Block
stops.description: Modern classrooms and smart lecture halls designed for collaborative, hands-on learning.

stops.title: Library & Resources
stops.description: A quiet space for research and study, with digital and print resources at your fingertips.

stops.title: Computer & Innovation Labs
stops.description: Well-equipped labs for programming, AI, and project work — the heart of practical learning.

stops.title: Student Lounge
stops.description: Relaxed spaces to collaborate, recharge, and connect with fellow students between classes.

stops.title: Campus Grounds
stops.description: Open spaces for sports, events, and the vibrant community life that makes WCBT feel like home.
